title: OpenPlanTrace Placement Export
description: Schema for compact downstream placement packets emitted by OpenPlanTrace. This artifact is meant for software that needs page-local coordinates, metric transforms when calibration is reliable, structural geometry, openings, object aggregates, routing hints, and explicit trust gates without consuming the full scanner result.

hostWallId.description: Primary wall identifier used as the placement anchor when one is available.

anchorWallIds.description: Wall segment ids used to derive the placement reference line. Split-wall openings can include both adjacent wall fragments.

referenceLine.description: Page-space line used as the local placement axis for offsets and direction vectors.

hostWallStartParameter.description: Opening start parameter on referenceLine where 0 is referenceLine.start and 1 is referenceLine.end.

composition.description: Machine-readable child-object makeup for this aggregate, including per-child placement bounds and metric bounds when calibration is reliable.

suppressedObjects.description: Detailed per-object routing suppression records. These explain why a raw object candidate should not be independently consumed and which aggregate obstacle or room-use hint replaces it.

ignoredObjects.description: Detailed object candidates intentionally omitted from routing obstacles, including reason, page and metric bounds, source evidence, and optional suppression or room-use links.

suppressedObjectCandidateIds.description: Object candidate IDs that should not be independently consumed by route/loop/layout tools because a higher-level aggregate already represents them.

ignoredObjectCandidateIds.description: Object candidate IDs that are intentionally not exported as routing obstacles.

suppressedByAggregateId.description: Object aggregate that replaces or explains this raw child object for routing/loop/layout consumers.

action.description: Recommended downstream action for route/loop/layout consumers.

replacementRoutingObstacleId.description: Routing obstacle ID to consume instead of the child object, when the aggregate is an obstacle.

roomUseHintId.description: Room-use hint ID to consume instead of the child object, when the aggregate is semantic evidence only.

reason.description: Why this object candidate is not exported as a routing obstacle.
